evals.name: churn-strategy-analysis
evals.prompt: Analyze our Q4 enterprise customer churn data and design a retention strategy for the executive board. We've seen a 5% increase in churn among our top-tier clients. Use causal inference to determine if this is linked to the recent UI overhaul.
evals.expected_output: A detailed strategy including business purpose, data refinement, causal inference modeling (LaTeX), risk analysis, and actionable recommendations. Should avoid correlations and focus on causality.

evals.name: ai-marketing-roi
evals.prompt: Evaluate the ROI of our new AI-driven marketing campaign. We spent $2M and saw a revenue lift of $5M. Is this lift truly attributable to the campaign, or would it have happened anyway? Provide a technical analysis suitable for the CFO.
evals.expected_output: Analysis using E[Y|do(X)] to separate campaign effects from organic growth. Must include LaTeX and executive-level storytelling.

evals.name: data-governance-framework
evals.prompt: Design a data governance framework for our multi-cloud enterprise environment (AWS/Azure/GCP). We need to ensure GDPR compliance while allowing for high-velocity data analysis via LLM agents. How do we balance fairness with speed?
evals.expected_output: A structured (MECE) framework covering architecture, compliance, and speed. Should include specifics on data lakes and agentic oversight.
